# kemp_virtual_service_waf_rule (Data Source)

Reads a WAF rule attachment on a virtual service (identified by address/port/protocol and rule name).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_virtual_service_waf_rule" "existing" {
  virtual_service_address  = "10.0.0.100"
  virtual_service_port     = "443"
  virtual_service_protocol = "tcp"
  rule                     = "G/ip_reputation"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `rule` (String) WAF rule path (e.g. `G/ip_reputation`).
- `virtual_service_address` (String) IP address of the virtual service.
- `virtual_service_port` (String) Port of the virtual service.
- `virtual_service_protocol` (String) Protocol of the virtual service (`tcp`, `udp`).

### Read-Only

- `disabled_rules` (String) Comma-separated WAF rule IDs disabled on this VS.
